message:
refactor(e2e): rename history types to avoid conflicts with other tests

Renames historyEntry → robotHistoryEntry and historyResponse →
robotHistoryResponse to prevent type name collisions with other E2E
test files that may define similar types.

This is a preparation for adding new E2E tests that need their own
copy/hooks response types without causing redefinition errors.

Changes:
- Rename struct historyEntry to robotHistoryEntry (5 occurrences)
- Rename struct historyResponse to robotHistoryResponse (4 occurrences)
- Update all function signatures and usages accordingly

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
